nasb.text: Then Huram, king of Tyre, answered in a letter sent to Solomon: “Because the Lord loves His people, He has made you king over them.”

esv.text: Then Hiram the king of Tyre answered in a letter that he sent to Solomon, “Because the Lord loves his people, he has made you king over them.”

cnv.text: 推羅王希蘭回信給所羅門說：“耶和華因為愛自己的子民，所以立你作他們的王。”

ccb.text: 泰尔王希兰写信给所罗门说：“耶和华爱祂的子民，所以立你做他们的王。
